readings.label: ECB CISS — United States
readings.interpretation: Values in [0, 1]. Levels above ~0.4 historically associated with broad financial-stability events. Daily cadence.

readings.label: ECB CISS — Euro Area
readings.interpretation: Values in [0, 1]. Levels above ~0.4 historically associated with broad financial-stability events. Daily cadence.

readings.label: ECB CISS — United Kingdom
readings.interpretation: Values in [0, 1]. Levels above ~0.4 historically associated with broad financial-stability events. Daily cadence.

readings.label: St. Louis Fed Financial Stress
readings.interpretation: 0 = normal conditions; >0 above-average stress; <0 below-average. Weekly-Thursday cadence.

readings.label: Recession probability · 12m
readings.interpretation: Recession probability 12 months out, conditional on current 10Y-3M Treasury spread, via Estrella-Mishkin probit. Persistent inversion = run-length >= 60 trading days.

readings.label: Sahm Rule recession signal
readings.interpretation: Sahm Rule: 3-month avg of UNRATE minus its trailing 12-month minimum, in percentage points. >= 0.50 pp = RECESSION_TRIGGERED (historical perfect record); >= 0.30 pp = EARLY_WARNING.

readings.label: HY credit-spread · OAS
readings.interpretation: HY OAS regime classifier. Level >= 1000 bps OR 1-month change >= 200 bps signals acute credit stress.

disclaimer: Latest available public readings, each dated to its provider's last publication. Risk measurement — not investment advice.
